nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Queries and Views","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h1"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Composable way of accessing resources in arbitrary locations, databases, etc. and treating them in the same way across multiple domains.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Queries and Views
Composable way of accessing resources in arbitrary locations, databases, etc. and treating them in the same way across multiple domains.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Scriptable Shell","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h1"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"The natural progression of meta commands is having a small scripting layer and a shell. Then you can code your own macros/sequences and commands.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Scriptable Shell
The natural progression of meta commands is having a small scripting layer and a shell. Then you can code your own macros/sequences and commands.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Embedded Agent","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h1"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Being able to control an agent from the app, where the agent has access to the HEP layer and can work on the board.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Embedded Agent
Being able to control an agent from the app, where the agent has access to the HEP layer and can work on the board.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Org-ish mode","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h1"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Support for org files, including TODOS, consolidated agendas, and clocking in.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Absolutely call it orgish","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Org-ish mode
Support for org files, including TODOS, consolidated agendas, and clocking in.
Absolutely call it orgish

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Resource Mount URIs","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Required for experimental features like queries and views, and also to have a more robus way of handling external data. Similar to environment variables.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Resource Mount URIs
Required for experimental features like queries and views, and also to have a more robus way of handling external data. Similar to environment variables.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Captions","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Being able to add little captions to pictures/video","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Captions
Being able to add little captions to pictures/video

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Subcards","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Being able to drag cards into cards like in Pleptica? may be an interesting idea, maybe could play really nice with orgish","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Linked cards","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h3"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Also the idea of pure ref where you can link a card to another so they move together or follow their parents, but please make it more obvious and easy to remove the link.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Subcards
Being able to drag cards into cards like in Pleptica? may be an interesting idea, maybe could play really nice with orgish
Linked cards
Also the idea of pure ref where you can link a card to another so they move together or follow their parents, but please make it more obvious and easy to remove the link.

nodes.plain:
Mind Maps
Like from Miro, not exactly on canvas, probably as blossoms

Lenses and Views
Absolutely a must for agents

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Night Theme","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"But first I need to extract all variables and find good opposites.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"User skins and themes","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h3"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Possibly as well. We could expose pretty much most things? In this case I would probably need to work together with a themer because I need to know what they need.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Night Theme
But first I need to extract all variables and find good opposites.
User skins and themes
Possibly as well. We could expose pretty much most things? In this case I would probably need to work together with a themer because I need to know what they need.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Implicit links and Pleptica-like perspectives","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Being able to link nodes without them showing up as an actual edge, and then being able to click on some icon like an eye and highlighting all nodes that are internally connected.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Implicit links and Pleptica-like perspectives
Being able to link nodes without them showing up as an actual edge, and then being able to click on some icon like an eye and highlighting all nodes that are internally connected.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Encrypted Crates","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h1"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Locked down workspaces that are decrypted when opening them to some staging directory, then on app close the entire staged dir is encrypted and crated back.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Encrypted Crates
Locked down workspaces that are decrypted when opening them to some staging directory, then on app close the entire staged dir is encrypted and crated back.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Documentation adapters","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Being able to \"wire up\" repositories like docusaurus, then being able to browse and link to pages (even edit them quickly?)","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Documentation adapters
Being able to "wire up" repositories like docusaurus, then being able to browse and link to pages (even edit them quickly?)

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"From a query we could get pictures and build a pureref board. Or, we could make our own pureref now that we know how it works more or less, with an open standard. OpenRef.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain: From a query we could get pictures and build a pureref board. Or, we could make our own pureref now that we know how it works more or less, with an open standard. OpenRef.
